fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact. If the contact is a person, you can click the field to see the Name Details window.

fields.name: Search Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's address.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city where the contact is located.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's phone number.

fields.name: Territory Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the territory code for the contact.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the contact.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Registration Number
fields.tooltip: Specifies the registration number of the contact. You can enter a maximum of 20 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the salesperson who normally handles this contact.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Format Region
fields.tooltip: Specifies the format region that is used when formatting dates and numbers on documents to foreign business partner, such as an total amount on an order date.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's fax number.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's VAT registration number. This field is valid for companies only.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's email.

fields.name: Home Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's web site.

fields.name: Image
fields.tooltip: Specifies the picture of the contact, for example, a photograph if the contact is a person, or a logo if the contact is a company.

fields.name: Privacy Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to limit access to data for the data subject during daily operations. This is useful, for example, when protecting data from changes while it is under privacy review.

fields.name: Minor
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the person's age is below the definition of adulthood as recognized by law. Data for minors is blocked until a parent or guardian of the minor provides parental consent. You unblock the data by choosing the Parental Consent Received check box.

fields.name: Parental Consent Received
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a parent or guardian of the minor has provided their consent to allow the minor to use this service. When this check box is selected, data for the minor can be processed.

fields.name: Coupled to Dataverse
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the contact is coupled to a contact in Dataverse.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of contact, either company or person.

fields.name: Company No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number for the contact's company.

fields.name: Company Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the company. If the contact is a person, it specifies the name of the company for which this contact works.

fields.name: First Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's first name and is valid for contact persons only.

fields.name: Middle Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's middle name and is valid for contact persons only.

fields.name: Surname
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's surname and is valid for contact persons only.

fields.name: Job Title
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's job title, and is valid for contact persons only.

fields.name: Initials
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's initials, when the contact is a person.

fields.name: Mobile Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's mobile telephone number.

fields.name: Organizational Level Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the organizational code for the contact, for example, top management. This field is valid for persons only.

fields.name: Exclude from Segment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the contact should be excluded from segments:

fields.name: Next Task Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the next task involving the contact.

fields.name: Last Date Attempted
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the contact was last contacted, for example, when you tried to call the contact, with or without success. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Date of Last Interaction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the last interaction involving the contact, for example, a received or sent mail, e-mail, or phone call. This field is not editable.

fields.name: No. of Job Responsibilities
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of job responsibilities for this contact. This field is valid for persons only and is not editable.

fields.name: No. of Industry Groups
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of industry groups to which the contact belongs. When the contact is a person, this field contains the number of industry groups for the contact's company. This field is not editable.

fields.name: No. of Mailing Groups
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of mailing groups for this contact.

fields.name: No. of Interactions
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of interactions created for this contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost of all the interactions involving the contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Duration (Min.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total duration of all the interactions involving the contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: No. of Opportunities
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of open opportunities involving the contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Estimated Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total estimated value of all the opportunities involving the contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Calcd. Current Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total calculated current value of all the opportunities involving the contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Contact Business Relation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the existing business relation.

fields.name: Correspondence Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the preferred type of correspondence for the interaction.

fields.name: Salutation Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the salutation code that will be used when you interact with the contact. The salutation code is only used in Word documents. To see a list of the salutation codes already defined, click the field.
